goal: Add a side-effect-free evidence pack builder for BPK-064 memory cache audit export contracts, collecting export manifest evidence without writing files, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, routes, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes.
scope_out: Do not write export files, add durable storage, DB writes, filesystem cache files, scheduler, routes, package changes, workflow changes, deployment files, or external calls.
claims: Audit export contracts can be packed as evidence without writing files.
Ready BPK-064 export contract and evidence refs are required.
assumptions: Actual export persistence would be a later task.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked export contract cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: File writes, durable storage, DB, filesystem cache, scheduler, route, package, workflow, deployment, or external-call changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-064 described memory cache audit export manifests without writing files.
